    How Screen Recording Works on theRec

    A complete workflow from browser capture to secure sharing — designed for async teams.

    End-to-end workflow

    theRec.site removes desktop installs and long upload waits. You record from Chrome, Edge, or Firefox, your video uploads in secure segments, our cloud prepares playback and thumbnails, and you share a link or invite teammates into a workspace. The steps below reflect the exact flow you will see in the product.

    01

    Start Recording

    Open the recorder in your browser.

    02

    Initialize Upload

    Your recording uploads securely in the background.

    03

    Processing Video

    Automated encoding prepares your video.

    04

    Recording Details

    Review, share, and manage visibility.

    05

    Workspace Dashboard

    Organize recordings across workspaces.

    01. Start Recording

    Choose screen, window, or tab with optional camera and mic.

    02. Initialize Upload

    Resume interrupted uploads when possible.

    03. Processing Video

    Get notified when processing completes.

    04. Recording Details

    Collaborate with your workspace team.

    05. Workspace Dashboard

    Track usage and subscription limits.

    Subscription workflow

    Upgrade your workspace in minutes

    A seamless billing and subscription experience designed for teams, creators, and businesses using theRec platform.

    01

    Current Subscription

    After logging into the platform, the user navigates to the Billing page from the dashboard sidebar. The current workspace subscription details, billing cycle, active plan, and subscription history are displayed here.

    02

    Choose a Plan

    The user can click “Change your plan” or upgrade to another plan. A pricing page is displayed with all available plans alongside monthly and yearly billing options for easy comparison.

    03

    Confirm Subscription

    After selecting a plan, the user is redirected to a confirmation page where recurring billing authorization and agreement to the terms and conditions must be accepted before continuing.

    04

    Enter Billing Information

    A billing popup or dialog appears requesting customer billing information such as name, email, country, city, address, and optional promo code before proceeding.

    05

    Final Review & Payment

    The final checkout review page displays the selected subscription plan, billing cycle, and payment summary. Clicking “Continue to Payment” redirects the user to Checkout review where the payment is securely completed.

    Start Recording

    Record, process, and share in minutes

    Start Recording
